segments.text: That's insanely high—already over 100%, could've at least given him another stock, another go, something more, but nope, this is what we're getting—just pure execution, pure fundamentals from the core, no...
segments.original_text: Muy alto, ahorita ya es arriba del 100%, le hubieran dado de menos un race, un go, un arsén, algo más, pero no, que es lo que vamos a tener, tal cual puro trabajo, puro y duro de la planta, que no le...

full_text: That's insanely high—already over 100%, could've at least given him another stock, another go, something more, but nope, this is what we're getting—just pure execution, pure fundamentals from the core, no...
